ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Temperature, Humidity, Light Intensity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model or specific type of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Greenhouse A, Field B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location above sea level */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the location */,
  "irrigation_system" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "ambient_humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity in percentage */,
  "light_intensity_par" REAL /* Light intensity in Photosynthetic Active Radiation (PAR) units */,
  "phi2" REAL /* Phi2 (quantum yield of photosystem II) */,
  "vh_plus" REAL /* vH+ (proton motive force) */,
  "relative_chlorophyll" REAL /* Relative chlorophyll content */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Leaf thickness in millimeters */,
  "leaf_angle" REAL /* Leaf angle in degrees */,
  "leaf_temperature_differential" REAL /* Leaf temperature differential in degrees Celsius */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "co2_level" REAL /* Carbon dioxide level in the environment */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil or water */,
  "water_content" REAL /* Soil moisture content */,
  "air_flow_rate" REAL /* Air flow rate in the environment */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant species */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the plant is situated */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was planted */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the plant */,
  "phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the plant */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Current growth stage of the plant */,
  "last_pruning_date" TEXT /* Date of the last pruning */,
  "last_harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of the last harvest */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant reading */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant being monitored */,
  "relative_chlorophyll" REAL /* Relative chlorophyll content */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Leaf thickness in millimeters */,
  "leaf_angle" REAL /* Leaf angle in degrees */,
  "leaf_temperature_differential" REAL /* Leaf temperature differential in degrees Celsius */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "stem_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the plant stem */,
  "root_length" REAL /* Length of the plant roots */,
  "flower_count" INTEGER /* Number of flowers on the plant */,
  "fruit_count" INTEGER /* Number of fruits on the plant */,
  "photosynthesis_rate" REAL /* Rate of photosynthesis */,
  "respiration_rate" REAL /* Rate of respiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_readings_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login to the system */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity in the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "reading_type" TEXT /* Type of reading accessed (e.g., sensor, plant) */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES plant_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
